Our Services

Everything Your Home's Electrical Needs

Licensed, permitted, and built to pass inspection every time. Clear pricing — no surprise fees. Most jobs completed in 1 day.

Most Popular

Electrical Panel Upgrades

Aging panels cause breaker trips and fire risk. We upgrade to 200A–400A with modern protection, permits pulled, and inspection passed. Most upgrades completed in 1 day.

Get a free quote →
EV Specialists

Tesla & EV Wall Charger Install

Wake up every morning to a full charge. We install Tesla Wall Connectors and all Level 2 chargers with dedicated 240V circuits and permits. Typically completed in 1 day.

Schedule install →
Save Up to 75%

LED Lighting & Retrofits

Recessed cans, under-cabinet strips, smart dimmers, new fixtures, exterior lighting — we modernize your home's lighting and reduce your energy bill significantly. Most lighting installs completed in 1 day.

Request estimate →

Home Remodel Wiring

Kitchen, bathroom, ADU, addition — every remodel needs a licensed electrician. We handle rough-in, trim-out, and permits from start to finish.

Learn more →

Home Additions & ADUs

Building an ADU or adding a room? We wire it from the ground up — sub-panel, circuits, outlets, lighting, and full permit coordination with the city. Timeline varies by project scope; we provide a clear schedule at your free evaluation.

Get a quote →
24/7 Available

24/7 Emergency Service

Sparks, burning smells, complete outages — we dispatch fast any time of day. Call us immediately for rapid response across all of Orange County.

Call now →
Clear Pricing · No Surprises

Know Your Costs Before We Start

No hidden fees. No last-minute add-ons. We visit your home, assess the full scope, and give you a written estimate the same day — completely free. You decide when you're ready.

Google Reviews
"

Called Robinson after our panel kept tripping every time we ran the AC and dishwasher at the same time. They came out the next morning, explained exactly what was needed, and had a brand new 200A panel installed by 3pm. Zero surprises on the invoice. House feels completely different — everything just works.

MG
Marcus G.Anaheim, CA
Panel Upgrade
"

Got my Tesla Model Y charger installed in one day. They pulled the permit, ran the dedicated 60A circuit, and mounted the Wall Connector exactly where I wanted it. Woke up the next morning to a full charge. Best upgrade I have made since buying the car.

JL
Jennifer L.Anaheim, CA
Tesla Charger
"

Smelled burning from an outlet at 10pm. Called Robinson — answered immediately, walked us through safely shutting the circuit off, and had a tech at our house within the hour. Found arcing aluminum wiring in the wall. Could have been catastrophic. These guys are the real deal.

TC
Tony C.Anaheim, CA
Emergency Repair
"

Whole house LED retrofit — every recessed can, kitchen under-cabinets, garage. Done in one day. Our electric bill dropped noticeably the very first month. Professional, clean, swept up before leaving. Wish we had done this years ago.

LED Retrofit

Home Remodels & Additions

Remodeling? Don't Overlook the Wiring.

Every kitchen, bathroom, ADU, or addition needs a licensed electrician who pulls permits and delivers work that passes inspection every time.

What We Handle

Full Remodel Electrical,
Start to Finish

We coordinate with your contractor, pull all permits, and ensure every project passes city inspection. Remodels and ADUs are scheduled based on project scope — we will walk you through the full timeline during your free evaluation.

  • Kitchen & Bathroom Remodels — New circuits, recessed lighting, GFCI outlets, hood vent wiring, under-cabinet LED
  • Room Additions & ADUs — Sub-panel, dedicated circuits, full rough-in wiring, permit and city inspection
  • Garage Conversions — Complete electrical build-out including EV charger readiness
  • Whole-Home Rewiring — Aluminum-to-copper, knob-and-tube replacement, full panel upgrade
  • Outdoor & Landscape Lighting — Pathway, security, patio, and deck lighting installations

How It Works

Electrical Work Made Simple

Four easy steps from your first call to a completed, inspected job — most done in 1 day.

1

Call or Request Online

Call (714) 794-1229 or fill out the form. We confirm your request the same day.

2

Free Same-Day Evaluation

We visit your home, assess the scope, and provide a clear written estimate — free, no obligation.

3

Professional Installation

Our licensed electricians complete your project on schedule. Minor jobs (lighting, EV chargers, switching) often done in 1 day.

4

Inspection & Sign-Off

We ensure your work passes city inspection and provide full documentation for your home records.
